query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A grayscale image showing dense clouds filling the sky, with heavy dark cloud masses occupying the lower left and upper right portions of the frame, interrupted by an irregular bright gap of lighter sky near the center.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grayscale image showing dense clouds filling the sky, with heavy dark cloud masses occupying the lower left and upper right portions interrupted by bright sky. The cloud surfaces lack fine detail and appear smeared and mushy, dissolving into soft ambiguity rather than resolving into crisp textures, while the heavy dark formations and somber tonal mood evoke an atmosphere of dread and unease.
